basic_details.job_title: HAL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 30 Finance Officer, Deputy Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) has released a recruitment notification for various Manager and Finance Officer posts under Advertisement No. HAL/CHRC-TM/RECTT-01/2026. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official HAL website.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 22-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 12-08-2026

selection_process: Shortlisting of Candidates Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Click on the online application link.
Fill out the application form correctly.
Submit the application form before the last date.
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 22-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 12-08-2026

content_sections.heading: HAL Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: HAL has announced vacancies for Finance and Design discipline posts. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for HAL Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualifications and experience as mentioned in the HAL recruitment notification can apply for these posts. Finance Officer: Candidates with relevant Finance qualifications such as CA/ICWA/MBA Finance as per HAL rules. Deputy Manager (Finance): Candidates having required Finance qualification and experience. Manager (Design): Candidates with relevant Engineering Degree in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics discipline.

content_sections.heading: HAL Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of Candidates Interview Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for HAL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official HAL website. Open the Career section. Read the recruitment notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete registration with required details. Fill out the application form correctly. Upload required documents. Submit the application form before the last date. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: HAL Recruitment 2026 includes 17 vacancies for Finance Officer, Deputy Manager and Manager (Design) posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 12 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official HAL website.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts are available under HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Finance Officer, Deputy Manager (Finance), and Manager (Design) posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type of HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: HAL Recruitment 2026 is a Central Government PSU recruitment opportunity.
